series_metadata.series_description: Welding procedure specification (WPS), Brazing Procedure specification (BPS), and procedure qualification record which list welding/brazing process and all pertinent specifications on the procedure involved.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Maintain computer data until records are no longer created by this agency, then destroy by erasure ; Microform: Retain master microfilm in appropriate storage facility until records are no longer created by this agency. Retain diazo copy in operating area ; Paper: Microfilm existing records; new records to be kept on hard copy and microfilmed annually. After microfilm has been checked for quality and completeness then destroy hard copy records, Electronic: Erase ; Microform: Shred ; Paper: Shred
